name: United Banc Card of TN
description_short: United Banc Card of TN offers merchant services, POS systems, and business funding solutions for restaurants, retail stores, and other businesses in Tennessee.
description_long:
United Banc Card of TN is a Tennessee-based merchant services and business solutions provider with over 10 years of industry experience. The company serves more than 3,000 clients across restaurants, food trucks, bars, and retail businesses with a focus on streamlining operations and payment processing.

The company's primary offerings include merchant services (credit card processing, merchant cash advances, check guarantees, high-risk merchant accounts), point-of-sale (POS) systems for restaurants and retail with inventory management and employee management features, payment terminals available for rental starting at $8/month, online payment processing solutions, and ATM machines for purchase. They also advertise business funding options, though details on specific loan products are limited on their website.

United Banc Card of TN distinguishes itself through a multi-service approach combining POS software, hardware, and payment processing under one provider. They market competitive features including 3% interest on financing, no prepayment penalties, support for high-risk merchant accounts, cloud-based POS solutions, and comprehensive ATM support including installation and maintenance. Their emphasis is on ease of use and operational efficiency rather than complex technical integration.

The company appears legitimate with a functional website, published phone number, and claims of 3,000+ active clients. However, their website lacks detailed information about specific business loan terms, qualification requirements, funding timelines, and loan amounts. The business funding section is underdeveloped compared to their merchant services offerings, suggesting this may be a secondary service. No third-party verification of their claims or customer reviews are visible on their provided website content.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Multi-service provider combining POS systems, payment processing, and business funding in one platform
Competitive 3% interest rate on business funding with no prepayment penalty
Affordable terminal rental options starting at $8/month with multiple hardware types
High-risk merchant account support for businesses that struggle to find providers
Over 10 years of industry experience with 3,000+ active clients
Cloud-based POS software designed for quick staff adoption and ease of use
Comprehensive ATM support including installation, troubleshooting, and maintenance
cons: Business funding section is minimal with no details on loan amounts, terms, or qualification criteria
Limited information about actual business loan products compared to merchant services offerings
No visible third-party reviews or verifications of lending practices on their website
No mention of funding speed or timeline for business loans
Unclear whether business funding is underwritten in-house or through a third party
best_for: Restaurants, bars, and food truck operators needing integrated POS and payment processing
Retail businesses seeking inventory management and omnichannel sales solutions
High-risk businesses unable to obtain merchant accounts from traditional providers
diagnosis: United Banc Card of TN is best suited for restaurant and retail operators seeking an integrated solution combining POS systems and payment processing, particularly those with non-traditional merchant profiles. The main caveat is that their business lending product is underdeveloped on their website—prospective borrowers should contact them directly for concrete loan terms, amounts, and approval requirements before assuming this is their primary lending focus.
services: Restaurant POS systems with inventory management
Retail POS systems with online ordering
Online payment processing with checkout solutions
ATM machines for purchase with installation and maintenance
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
